---
title: "About Me"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    body-classes: "page-about"
---

## **My Family**

<div class="gallery-grid">

<a href="images/family.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family.jpeg" alt="Maria and daughter"></a>
<a href="images/family2.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family2.jpeg" alt="On the snow"></a>
<a href="images/family3.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family3.jpeg" alt="On the snow"></a>
<a href="images/io4.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/io4.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/family5.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family5.jpeg" alt="kids"></a>
<a href="images/family1.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family1.jpeg" alt="kids"></a>
<a href="images/lumacone.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/lumacone.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/family4.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family4.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/family7.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family7.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/io2.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/io2.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/io.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/io.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/family8.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family8.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/family6.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/family6.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/neve2023.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/neve2023.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/lago.jpeg" data-lightbox="family"><img src="images/lago.jpeg" alt=""></a>
</div>

---

## **Experiences from my work, travels, and much more...**

<div class="gallery-grid">

<a href="images/travels10.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels10.jpeg" alt="University stairs"></a>
<a href="images/travels7.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels7.jpeg" alt="Teaching class"></a>
<a href="images/travels4.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels4.jpeg" alt="Teaching class"></a>
<a href="images/giardini.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/giardini.jpeg" alt="Teaching class"></a>
<a href="images/ale40.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/ale40.jpeg" alt="Teaching class"></a>
<a href="images/travels8.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels8.jpeg" alt="Teaching class"></a>
<a href="images/travels2.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels2.jpeg" alt="TALL"></a>
<a href="images/travels1.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels1.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/travels9.jpg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels9.jpg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/travels6.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels6.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/travels3.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels3.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/travels5.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels5.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/travels.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/travels.jpeg" alt=""></a>
<a href="images/concerto.jpeg" data-lightbox="work"><img src="images/concerto.jpeg" alt="Teaching class"></a>
</div>
